meta.notes: Self-expanding query pool used by the weekly audit routine. Seeds are hand-curated from Meridian's services + suburbs. The routine re-checks each query against live search results every Saturday, harvests up to 5 new queries per run from Google autocomplete on the seeds that matter, and demotes queries that stop yielding useful signal. See docs/audit-dashboard-setup.md §6 for full routine prompt and self-expansion rules. 2026-05-08: autocomplete fetch (suggestqueries.google.com) is STILL blocked by the routine host egress allowlist — confirmed again this run via curl ('Host not in allowlist'). Workaround retained: pool self-expands via queries derived from previous-run SERP gaps (source: 'derived'). Durable fix = widen the routine egress allowlist to include suggestqueries.google.com and meridianosteopathy.co.nz.

lastResult.notes: Reshuffle: betterhealthosteopathy.nz climbed into top 3 (was outside top 5 last run). Same dominant set otherwise. Meridian still not in top 10.

Halswell Rd Clinic + osteo.co.nz/halswell still own slots #1-2; finetuneosteopathy.com and christchurch-osteopathy-acupuncture.co.nz now appear in top 5. Aggregators (healthpages, facebook, gensolve) excluded.

SERP regressed further this week — Google autocorrects to 'Winchmore Hill' (UK) and returns no NZ results at all. Our actual location and we still have no signal at all. Suggests we need a literal 'Hillmorton' mention on a service page or a small 'finding us' page.
Better Health climbed to #1 this week (was outside top 3 last run). Yelp/whodoyou aggregators excluded.
osteo.co.nz still has dedicated ACC landing; we don't. Item #25 unchanged.
NZ-relevant top 2 unchanged (osteo.co.nz/halswell + Halswell Rd Clinic); slots 3-5 are US clinics — Google blending US results due to weak NZ SERP.
Comparison-content gap remains. Halswell Clinic owns the NZ-side comparison post.
Better Health has a dedicated /conditions/neck-pain/ URL ranking on second page; we still have no condition page. Item #22 unchanged.
Better Health owns /back-pain-relief-osteopath-christchurch/ AND has a second URL ranking — they've doubled down. We still have no equivalent page. Item #23 unchanged.

Three weeks since /conditions/sciatica/ shipped and still not surfacing. Re-check next run; if no movement by week 4 we may need additional internal links / a dedicated H2 in the osteopathy service intro.
MK Osteopathy owns the slot via a single targeted blog post; demonstrates the freshness/blog-velocity pattern from item #14.
Our /conditions/pregnancy-back-pain/ shipped two weeks ago, still not visible. Same indexing-lag pattern as sciatica.

Notable: happyspine.co.nz/nina-hu surfaces top 3 — that's our own acupuncturist's separate paediatric osteo profile. Internal duplication of authority. Worth deciding whether to consolidate or coexist.
Our /conditions/sports-injury-recovery/ also still not visible at the 3-week mark.
Same dominant set. acuclinic.co.nz climbed from #4 to #2.

MAJOR SHIFT: physios fully owned this last run (musclepeople, physiosouth, acupuncturechristchurch.com); this week the SERP pivoted entirely back to TCM acupuncturists. Possibly geo/personalization variability. Either way, we still don't surface — and the term 'medical acupuncture' is the framing item #17 was meant to claim. Item #17 unchanged in priority but the surfacing pattern is now ambiguous.
Physios still own every NZ slot — exactly the failure item #17 was created to fix. Unchanged.

REGRESSED: Elite Physio Halswell that surfaced last week is gone — every top 5 result is now a US clinic. Suburb gap is now uncontested AGAIN, but in an unhealthy way (Google found no NZ-relevant content for the suburb+modality combination). Reinforces that item #17 should explicitly mention Halswell in the acupuncture page reframe.

Our /services/acupuncture/fertility/ shipped 2 weeks ago, still not visible. Note: nikauroom.co.nz is at 164 Clarence St Riccarton — same address as Nina Hu's Happy Spine (paediatric osteo competitor we already knew). Concentration of fertility/paediatric authority at one address worth tracking.
Pure informational query; non-NZ authority sites win. Low priority as a direct-intent query — drop further if it stays at 35 next run.

Different mix vs last run — Western herbalists (Herb Centre, Apothecary, NZ Herbals) now dominate over Chinese herbal clinics. Confirms intent here is naturopath/Western herbal, not TCM-style consultation. Lowering priority further next run if pattern persists.
Stable set.

osteopath-christchurch.com still owns it on blog cadence. Same player as headaches cluster — they're winning multiple niche queries by publishing 1 short blog post per condition (the pattern item #14 targets).
Derived seed checking out; behaviour mirrors tmj query.

First check: NO NZ clinic owns 'osteopath wigram'. SERP is health4you.co.nz aggregator + UK/US generic info. Genuine uncontested suburb gap — but priority 40 (post-decay) keeps it below the rule threshold for auto-adding a punch-list item. Worth flagging for next run.

First check: Performance Plus Physio's /our-team/ page surfaces (their Addington osteo Matthew at 351 Lincoln Rd) but otherwise UK clinics dominate. Soft suburb gap — partially contested by one local physio.
Better Health has multiple URL variants ranking. Same blog-cadence dominance pattern.
porthillsosteo.co.nz is a new entrant in top 5 vs paediatric query.
